objective: Plan the aggregate selected-profile M5 adversarial proof over pairing, admission, frontier, result lineage, revocation, and retained negative evidence.
falsifiable_claim: Pairing never escalates, guests cannot self-admit, and replay or origin, target, attempt, lease, and revocation substitutions fail closed while attribution survives.
exit_criteria: Pairing never escalates and a guest cannot self-admit.
Replay and origin, target, attempt, lease, and revocation substitutions fail closed; attribution and negative evidence survive export and rebuild.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M5_SELECTED_PROFILE_EXIT_PROOF_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Run the aggregate two-client pairing, guest admission, replay, origin/target/key/attempt, lease/revocation, result-attribution, negative-evidence, and export substitution matrix.
remaining_nonclaims: No public marketplace, correctness, payout, M9 cohort, or federation claim.
No M5 status transition occurs without committed literal exit evidence.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
